parallax: deferred; integrated master retained for visual coherence

polishPass.materialRule: wood door leaf, blackened riveted iron frame
polishPass.lightingRule: cool ceiling lights with one restrained warm task light
polishPass.renderingRule: crisp painterly hybrid authored at reference scale with Point output

ambientMotionDecision.reason: post-authored light, gauge, steam, and whole-sprite overlays did not share the source painting's material language or animation design
ambientMotionDecision.replacementRule: [proposal] identify animated objects during room concepting and author their base, occlusion matte, loop frames, and resting frame together with the environment asset
